planSummary: Verifies the unified phone+OTP register/login flow on mobile, deferred email verification, and dashboard membership-based promotion to staff. Dashboard email+password login is unchanged. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-27-mobile-otp-only-auth-design.md.
runSummary: First QA pass after merge of feat/mobile-otp-only-auth.

cases.summary: Register new user with valid phone + email → SMS arrives → enter code → land in client home
cases.text: 1. Open mobile app, tap 'تسجيل'. 2. Fill firstName, lastName, phone (+9665XXXXXXXX), email. 3. Submit. 4. Wait for SMS (4-digit code). 5. Enter code on otp-verify screen. 6. Confirm: lands in client tab navigator (home tab visible).

cases.summary: Register: duplicate phone → generic ConflictException (no leakage)
cases.text: Use a phone that already has a registered account. Submit registration. Expect generic 'Account already exists' — never 'phone already registered' or 'email already registered'.

cases.summary: Login by phone → SMS arrives → success
cases.text: Tap login, enter phone of an active user, submit, receive SMS, enter 4-digit code, lands in client home.

cases.summary: Login by verified email → email arrives → success
cases.text: Email previously verified via banner+link. Tap login, enter email, submit, receive email OTP, enter, lands in client home.

cases.summary: Login by unverified email → silent (no OTP sent)
cases.text: Email not yet verified. Tap login, enter email, submit (success response with masked identifier — no info leakage). No email arrives. Subsequent verify-otp call fails with invalid code.

cases.summary: Unverified-email banner: tap → email arrives → tap link → returns to app verified
cases.text: Open settings (or employee profile), see banner 'بريدك الإلكتروني غير مؤكد'. Tap 'إرسال رابط التفعيل'. Open inbox, tap link. Browser shows verification success, deep-links carekit://settings?verified=1. Banner gone after refresh.

cases.summary: Admin attaches membership in dashboard → user reopens app → routed to (employee)
cases.text: From dashboard, navigate to employees → 'attach existing user' dialog. Enter user's phone or email. Confirm role. Save. User force-quits + reopens mobile → /me returns activeMembership → app lands in employee 'today' tab.

cases.summary: Admin removes membership → user reopens app → routed to (client)
cases.text: From dashboard, deactivate the user's membership. User reopens app → /me returns activeMembership: null → lands in client home.
Admin enters a phone/email that has no User. Backend returns NotFoundException. Dashboard shows: 'User not found — they must register on the mobile app first.'

cases.summary: Attach-membership: user already a member → 409 with 'MEMBERSHIP_EXISTS'
cases.text: Admin tries to attach a user who already has an active membership in this org. Backend returns ConflictException. Dashboard shows appropriate message.

cases.summary: OTP rate limit: 6th SMS request in an hour rejected (429)
cases.text: Trigger 5 OTP requests within 60 minutes for the same phone. 6th request returns 429 Too Many Requests.

cases.summary: OTP attempts cap: 5 wrong codes locks the OTP for 10 minutes
cases.text: Enter 5 wrong codes consecutively. 6th attempt returns 'OTP_LOCKED_OUT' even with the correct code; user must wait 10 minutes or request a new OTP.

cases.summary: Tenant isolation: Sawaa-app OTP cannot be consumed under a different org
cases.text: Already covered by E2E suite at apps/backend/test/e2e/identity/mobile-auth.e2e-spec.ts. Confirm runs green on QA env: cd apps/backend && npm run test:e2e -- mobile-auth.

cases.summary: Dashboard email+password login still works (regression check)
cases.text: Open dashboard at :5103, sign in as admin@carekit-test.com / Admin@1234. Confirm: dashboard loads as before; no behavioural change to dashboard auth.

cases.summary: Mobile-only account cannot log in to dashboard
cases.text: User registered via mobile (passwordHash = null). Try to log in to dashboard with that email. Expect: 'Invalid credentials' generic rejection (no info leakage that the account exists with no password).

cases.summary: OTP code length is 4 digits (regression for guest-booking + client-auth)
cases.text: Existing flows that use OtpCode (guest booking, client password reset, etc.) now emit 4-digit codes. Verify guest-booking SMS contains a 4-digit code and the verification UI accepts only 4 digits.
